title: Axe-eptional pvp pack
description: Adds new weapon textures and overlays for clean looking gameplay.
body: This packs aims to enhance vanilla minecraft, giving you a better chance of destroying your opponents in pvp. Weapons and tools have gotten a cool overlay. So have potions, foods and a bunch of more stuff. The pack also includes some must haves for pvp, like low fire, low side shield, small totem pop and smaller particles. The pack file also comes with a folder of skin overlays to use, like an easter, xmas and halloween overlay. But also a onesie overlay if you wanna get cosy. The pack also includes various references to the indie game Undertale, like a blue bone and both the elytra and the webs referencing Napstablook's home. So have fun!
